title: Moist American Eggs Bake
description: A sweet and light breakfast dish that's perfect for a quick and energizing start to your day.

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: white granulated sugar is best for this recipe

ingredients.name: milk
ingredients.notes: whole milk or a non-dairy milk alternative works well here

ingredients.name: flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality all-purpose flour for best results

ingredients.name: baking powder
ingredients.notes: make sure your baking powder is fresh for best results

ingredients.name: nutmeg
ingredients.notes: freshly grated nutmeg is best, but ground is fine too

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: use high-quality vanilla extract for best flavor

ingredients.name: brown sugar
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds a nice flavor to the dish

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, granulated sugar, and milk until well combined.
Add the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg to the bowl and mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Melt the butter and add it to the bowl, stirring to combine.
Add the vanilla extract and mix to combine.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
If using, sprinkle the brown sugar over the top of the batter.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
